} return voidTypeAnnotation(); } else { return; } } if (node.typeAnnotation) { return node.typeAnnotation; } if (typeAnnotationInferringNodes.has(node)) { return; } typeAnnotationInferringNodes.add(node); } } finally { typeAnnotationInferringNodes.delete(node); } } function isBaseType(baseName, soft) { return _isBaseType(baseName, this.getTypeAnnotation(), soft); } function _isBaseType(baseName, type, soft) { if (baseName === "string") { return isStringTypeAnnotation(type); } else if (baseName === "mixed") { return isMixedTypeAnnotation(type); } else if (baseName === "empty") { return isEmptyTypeAnnotation(type); } else if (baseName === "void") { return isVoidTypeAnnotation(type); } else { if (soft) { return false; } else { throw new Error(`Unknown base type ${baseName}`); } } } function couldBeBaseType(name) { const type = this.getTypeAnnotation(); if (isAnyTypeAnnotation(type)) return true;
